scan_table_check.description: The input schema of an AI Agent describes the parameters that the orchestartor should use to execute a tool. The input schema is stored in a JSON string in the AI Agent Tool record and in the m2m record that binds an AI Agent Tool with the AI Agent. The JSON string in the m2m record must be valid, of course, and consistent with the input schema stored in the related Agent Tool. If the input schema is not valid or inconsistent, this may prevent the AI Agent from working correctly.
scan_table_check.name: CodeSanity - AI Agent Tool m2m Input Schema
scan_table_check.resolution_details: An invalid JSON string must be corrected and any inconsistency between the AI Agent Tool record an the m2m record must be resolved.
scan_table_check.short_description: The input schema of an AI Agent Tool m2m must be valid and consistent
scan_table_check.sys_name: CodeSanity - AI Agent Tool m2m Input Schema
